0:{"rsc":["$","$1","c",{"children":[[["$","h1",null,{"children":"Migration"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"Upgrade Mnemosyne versions and migrate data between instances."}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"children":"Version Upgrade"}],"\n",["$","h3",null,{"children":"Check Current Version"}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"code":"python -c \"import mnemosyne; print(mnemosyne.__version__)\"\n","language":"bash"}],"\n",["$","h3",null,{"children":"Upgrade Steps"}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"code":"# 1. Backup current database\ncp mnemosyne.db mnemosyne-pre-upgrade.db\n\n# 2. Upgrade package\npip install --upgrade mnemosyne\n\n# 3. Run migrations\npython -m mnemosyne.migrate --db mnemosyne.db\n\n# 4. Verify\npython -c \"from mnemosyne import Memory; m = Memory(); print(m.stats())\"\n","language":"bash"}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"children":"Schema Migrations"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"Mnemosyne uses automatic schema migrations:"}],"\n",["$","table",null,{"children":[["$","thead",null,{"children":["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","th",null,{"children":"Version"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Migration"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Description"}]]}]}],["$","tbody",null,{"children":[["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"1.0 → 2.0"}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"m_1_0_to_2_0"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Add semantic memory, FTS5 indices"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"2.0 → 2.1"}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"m_2_0_to_2_1"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Add session_id to episodic"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"2.1 → 2.2"}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"m_2_1_to_2_2"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Add temporal graph indexes"}]]}]]}]]}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"Migrations run automatically on first connection. No manual intervention needed."}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"children":"Cross-Instance Migration"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"Export from old instance, import to new:"}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"code":"# Export\npython -m mnemosyne.export --db old.db --format json --output export.json\n\n# Import\npython -m mnemosyne.import --db new.db --format json --input export.json\n","language":"bash"}],"\n",["$","h3",null,{"children":"Export Formats"}],"\n",["$","table",null,{"children":[["$","thead",null,{"children":["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","th",null,{"children":"Format"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Use Case"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Size"}]]}]}],["$","tbody",null,{"children":[["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"JSON"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Human-readable, version control"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Large"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"SQLite"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Fast, preserves all metadata"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Compact"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"CSV"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Spreadsheet analysis"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Medium"}]]}]]}]]}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"children":"Rollback"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"If upgrade fails:"}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"code":"# Stop application\n# Restore pre-upgrade backup\ncp mnemosyne-pre-upgrade.db mnemosyne.db\n\n# Downgrade package\npip install mnemosyne==1.0.0\n\n# Restart\n","language":"bash"}],"\n",["$","div",null,{"className":"callout callout-warning","children":["$","div",null,{"className":"flex items-start
